hero.eyebrow: Trusted Cyber Security Partner for Business and Enterprise
hero.supportingText: From continuous monitoring to risk assessments and incident response, Cyberxperts provides practical security services that help organisations understand their exposure and improve their security posture.

trustStrip.title: Free Security Pre-Assessment
trustStrip.desc: Understand your security posture in minutes

footer.tagline: Cyber security and IT services for businesses across South Africa and the SADC region.
footer.copyrightText: © {year} Cyberxperts. All rights reserved. | Website by Soluxionz Drip (Pty) Ltd

company.whatsappMessage: Hello, I'd like to find out more about Cyberxperts' services.

products.headline: Solutions from the partners we trust.
products.description: Cyberxperts implements and supports security and IT products from established vendors. Browse by partner or filter by category.

resources.headline: Threat updates, partner news, and industry trends.
resources.description: Practical, ongoing updates to help you stay informed about emerging threats, new tools, and developments that matter to your organisation's security posture.

categories.title: Threat Advisories
categories.desc: Updates on emerging vulnerabilities, active exploitation campaigns, and sector-specific threats relevant to South African and SADC organisations.

categories.title: Partner & Product Updates
categories.desc: New releases, major updates, and capability changes from our technology partners, including Microsoft, Fortinet, Mimecast, and others.

categories.title: Industry Trends
categories.desc: Developments in regulation, compliance frameworks, and the broader cyber security landscape that may affect how your organisation manages risk.

careers.headline: Build your career with us.
careers.description: We're always looking for capable people to join our cyber security and IT teams. Browse open roles below.

contact.headline: Speak with a security professional.
contact.description: Book a consultation, request an assessment, or get in touch directly. We respond to every enquiry personally.

faqs.q: How quickly can you respond to a security incident?
faqs.a: Contact us directly by phone for time-sensitive incidents. Our team will assess and respond based on the nature and severity of the situation.

faqs.q: Do you work with organisations outside South Africa?
faqs.a: Yes. We operate across the SADC region and have delivered engagements in multiple countries.

faqs.q: Can you support both a one-off assessment and ongoing managed services?
faqs.a: Yes, both engagement models are available, depending on your requirements.
